item.title: Working at Nordstrom Rack as a Sales Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A comprehensive look at the Nordstrom Rack sales associate role, including hourly pay, employee discounts, daily responsibilities, and real worker feedback.
